requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (SONCAP on NIS IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（SONCAP，依 NIS IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（SONCAP，依 NIS IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires imported into Nigeria are regulated products under the mandatory SONCAP (SON Conformity Assessment Programme) run by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON). Electrical safety is assessed against NIS IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), the Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting IEC 60598-1, together with the applicable NIS IEC 60598-2 particular standards for the luminaire type. The conformity route has two stages: (1) a Product Certificate (PC) for the model/model-family, based on test reports from a SON-recognised laboratory plus factory documentation; (2) a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (SC) issued by a SON-appointed conformity-assessment service provider before vessel loading. The SC is presented at the port for customs clearance — no SC means no clearance at Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne. An in-country importer of record is required. Test conditions assume a 230 V / 50 Hz supply (Nigerian nominal mains).
summary.zh: 进口至尼日利亚的 LED 灯具属于由尼日利亚标准组织（SON）运行的强制性 SONCAP（SON 合格评定程序）下的受管制产品。电气安全依据 NIS IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）评估——该尼日利亚工业标准采用 IEC 60598-1——并结合适用于该灯具类型的 NIS IEC 60598-2 特定标准。合格评定路径分两阶段：（1）就型号/型号系列取得产品证书（PC），依据 SON 认可实验室的检测报告及工厂文件；（2）就每批货物取得由 SON 指定的合格评定服务商在装船前签发的 SONCAP 证书（SC）。SC 须在港口出示以供清关——无 SC 则无法在拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或 Onne 清关。须有在地登记进口商。试验条件假定 230 V / 50 Hz 供电（尼日利亚标称电源）。
summary.zht: 進口至奈及利亞的 LED 燈具屬於由奈及利亞標準組織（SON）運行的強制性 SONCAP（SON 合格評定程序）下的受管制產品。電氣安全依據 NIS IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）評估——該奈及利亞工業標準採用 IEC 60598-1——並結合適用於該燈具類型的 NIS IEC 60598-2 特定標準。合格評定路徑分兩階段：（1）就型號/型號系列取得產品證書（PC），依據 SON 認可實驗室的檢測報告及工廠文件；（2）就每批貨物取得由 SON 指定的合格評定服務商在裝船前簽發的 SONCAP 證書（SC）。SC 須在港口出示以供清關——無 SC 則無法在拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或 Onne 清關。須有在地登記進口商。試驗條件假定 230 V / 50 Hz 供電（奈及利亞標稱電源）。

standards_or_laws: SONCAP — SON Conformity Assessment Programme (mandatory pre-shipment conformity assessment for regulated products; Product Certificate + per-shipment SONCAP Certificate)
NIS IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting IEC 60598-1)
NIS IEC 60598-2 series — Luminaires — Part 2: Particular requirements (by luminaire type)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026. Both editions are built on the IEC 60598-1 base, so the technical content is broadly aligned with NIS IEC 60598-1. For luminaires sold in China, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) obligations for in-scope products are governed by the applicable CNCA rules (CNCA-C10-01) and implementation requirements; CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-authorized laboratories. China's nominal supply is 220 V / 50 Hz. CCC certificates and Chinese test reports are not recognised under the Nigerian SONCAP conformity pathway.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。两版均以 IEC 60598-1 为基础，故技术内容与 NIS IEC 60598-1 大致一致。在中国销售的灯具，范围内产品的 CCC（中国强制性产品认证）义务由适用的 CNCA 规则（CNCA-C10-01）及实施要求决定；CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行。中国标称供电为 220 V / 50 Hz。CCC 证书及中国检测报告不被尼日利亚 SONCAP 合格评定路径所认可。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。兩版均以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，故技術內容與 NIS IEC 60598-1 大致一致。在中國銷售的燈具，範圍內產品的 CCC（中國強制性產品認證）義務由適用的 CNCA 規則（CNCA-C10-01）及實施要求決定；CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。中國標稱供電為 220 V / 50 Hz。CCC 證書及中國檢測報告不被奈及利亞 SONCAP 合格評定路徑所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; IEC 60598-1 base)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA)

gap.en: NIS IEC 60598-1 and GB 7000.1 share the IEC 60598-1 technical base, so the core safety requirements (protection against electric shock, creepage and clearance, thermal endurance, mechanical strength) are broadly aligned. The gap is procedural, not mainly technical: (1) China's CCC and Nigeria's SONCAP are separate, non-mutual schemes — a CCC certificate does not satisfy SONCAP; (2) SONCAP requires a Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, the latter issued before vessel loading by a SON-appointed service provider — a step that has no CCC analogue; (3) testing must be to the NIS/IEC edition accepted by SON, performed by a SON-recognised laboratory; (4) an in-country importer of record is mandatory; (5) products must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz (Nigeria) rather than 220 V (China), so input voltage range and marking must cover the Nigerian nominal voltage. Build SONCAP lead time (PC issuance + per-shipment SC) into the shipping schedule — a shipment that arrives without a valid SC faces clearance refusal.
gap.zh: NIS IEC 60598-1 与 GB 7000.1 共享 IEC 60598-1 技术基础，故核心安全要求（防触电、爬电距离与电气间隙、热耐久、机械强度）大致一致。差距主要在程序而非技术：（1）中国 CCC 与尼日利亚 SONCAP 为各自独立、互不认可的方案——CCC 证书不满足 SONCAP；（2）SONCAP 要求产品证书加每批货物 SONCAP 证书，后者由 SON 指定服务商在装船前签发——此步骤无 CCC 对应；（3）检测须按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本、由 SON 认可实验室进行；（4）须有在地登记进口商；（5）产品须按 230 V / 50 Hz（尼日利亚）而非 220 V（中国）定额，故输入电压范围及标志须覆盖尼日利亚标称电压。须将 SONCAP 前置时间（PC 签发 + 每批 SC）纳入运输计划——到港时无有效 SC 的货物将被拒绝清关。
gap.zht: NIS IEC 60598-1 與 GB 7000.1 共享 IEC 60598-1 技術基礎，故核心安全要求（防觸電、爬電距離與電氣間隙、熱耐久、機械強度）大致一致。差距主要在程序而非技術：（1）中國 CCC 與奈及利亞 SONCAP 為各自獨立、互不認可的方案——CCC 證書不滿足 SONCAP；（2）SONCAP 要求產品證書加每批貨物 SONCAP 證書，後者由 SON 指定服務商在裝船前簽發——此步驟無 CCC 對應；（3）檢測須按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本、由 SON 認可實驗室進行；（4）須有在地登記進口商；（5）產品須按 230 V / 50 Hz（奈及利亞）而非 220 V（中國）定額，故輸入電壓範圍及標誌須覆蓋奈及利亞標稱電壓。須將 SONCAP 前置時間（PC 簽發 + 每批 SC）納入運輸計劃——到港時無有效 SC 的貨物將被拒絕清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SONCAP Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate required before customs clearance; safety assessed against NIS IEC 60598-1 and applicable NIS IEC 60598-2 standards
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire is within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Nigeria require SONCAP clearance — a Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate — with electrical safety assessed against NIS IEC 60598-1 and the applicable NIS IEC 60598-2 particular standards. The technical safety base is broadly aligned with China's IEC 60598-1-derived GB 7000.1, but CCC certification does not satisfy SONCAP: testing must be to the SON-accepted NIS/IEC edition by a SON-recognised lab, an in-country importer of record is required, and products must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz. The binding gap is procedural — the per-shipment SC has no CCC analogue and must be obtained before vessel loading.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入尼日利亚的 LED 灯具须通过 SONCAP 清关——产品证书加每批货物 SONCAP 证书——电气安全依据 NIS IEC 60598-1 及适用的 NIS IEC 60598-2 特定标准评估。安全技术基础与中国源自 IEC 60598-1 的 GB 7000.1 大致一致，但 CCC 认证不满足 SONCAP：检测须按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本、由 SON 认可实验室进行，须有在地登记进口商，且产品须按 230 V / 50 Hz 定额。关键差距在程序——每批 SC 无 CCC 对应，且须在装船前取得。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入奈及利亞的 LED 燈具須通過 SONCAP 清關——產品證書加每批貨物 SONCAP 證書——電氣安全依據 NIS IEC 60598-1 及適用的 NIS IEC 60598-2 特定標準評估。安全技術基礎與中國源自 IEC 60598-1 的 GB 7000.1 大致一致，但 CCC 認證不滿足 SONCAP：檢測須按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本、由 SON 認可實驗室進行，須有在地登記進口商，且產品須按 230 V / 50 Hz 定額。關鍵差距在程序——每批 SC 無 CCC 對應，且須在裝船前取得。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp + Driver Safety (NIS IEC 62560 / NIS IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯及驱动器安全（NIS IEC 62560 / NIS IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈及驅動器安全（NIS IEC 62560 / NIS IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (LED bulbs with integral control gear) imported into Nigeria are assessed under SONCAP against NIS IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety specifications), the Nigerian adoption of IEC 62560. Where the LED driver (control gear) is supplied as a separate component or for built-in use, safety is assessed against NIS IEC 61347-2-13 (Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), adopting IEC 61347-2-13. As with luminaires, the route is a Product Certificate for the model family plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate issued before vessel loading and required for port clearance. Lamps and drivers must be rated for the Nigerian 230 V / 50 Hz mains. SON may require the importer's details and product markings (rated voltage, wattage, cap type) to match the certified model.
summary.zh: 进口至尼日利亚的自镇流 LED 灯（带集成控制装置的 LED 灯泡）在 SONCAP 下依据 NIS IEC 62560（电压 > 50 V 的普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求，即采用 IEC 62560 的尼日利亚标准）评估。当 LED 驱动器（控制装置）作为独立部件或内置用途供货时，安全依据 NIS IEC 61347-2-13（灯控装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求，采用 IEC 61347-2-13）评估。与灯具相同，路径为就型号系列取得产品证书，加上在装船前签发并为港口清关所必需的每批货物 SONCAP 证书。灯及驱动器须按尼日利亚 230 V / 50 Hz 电源定额。SON 可要求进口商信息及产品标志（额定电压、功率、灯头类型）与认证型号一致。
summary.zht: 進口至奈及利亞的自鎮流 LED 燈（帶集成控制裝置的 LED 燈泡）在 SONCAP 下依據 NIS IEC 62560（電壓 > 50 V 的普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求，即採用 IEC 62560 的奈及利亞標準）評估。當 LED 驅動器（控制裝置）作為獨立部件或內置用途供貨時，安全依據 NIS IEC 61347-2-13（燈控裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求，採用 IEC 61347-2-13）評估。與燈具相同，路徑為就型號系列取得產品證書，加上在裝船前簽發並為港口清關所必需的每批貨物 SONCAP 證書。燈及驅動器須按奈及利亞 230 V / 50 Hz 電源定額。SON 可要求進口商信息及產品標誌（額定電壓、功率、燈頭類型）與認證型號一致。

standards_or_laws: NIS IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting IEC 62560)
NIS IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (adopting IEC 61347-2-13)
SONCAP — Product Certificate + per-shipment SONCAP Certificate

summary.en: China's equivalents are GB/T 24906 / GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety requirements), aligned with IEC 62560, and GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), aligned with IEC 61347-2-13. CCC certification may apply to LED lamps and to drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market, administered under CNCA-C10-01 by CNCA-authorized bodies (e.g. CQC). China's nominal supply is 220 V / 50 Hz. CCC certificates and Chinese test reports are not recognised under the Nigerian SONCAP pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 24906 / GB 24906-2010（电压 > 50 V 的普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求，与 IEC 62560 对齐）及 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求，与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐）。在中国居民市场销售的 LED 灯及特定功率范围内的驱动器可能适用 CCC 认证，依 CNCA-C10-01 由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）管理。中国标称供电为 220 V / 50 Hz。CCC 证书及中国检测报告不被尼日利亚 SONCAP 路径所认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 24906 / GB 24906-2010（電壓 > 50 V 的普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求，與 IEC 62560 對齊）及 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求，與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊）。在中國居民市場銷售的 LED 燈及特定功率範圍內的驅動器可能適用 CCC 認證，依 CNCA-C10-01 由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）管理。中國標稱供電為 220 V / 50 Hz。CCC 證書及中國檢測報告不被奈及利亞 SONCAP 路徑所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 / GB/T 24906 — Self-ballasted LED lamps > 50 V — Safety requirements (IEC 62560 base)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: electronic controlgear for LED modules (IEC 61347-2-13 base)

gap.en: NIS IEC 62560 / NIS IEC 61347-2-13 and the Chinese GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 share the same IEC technical base, so lamp and driver safety content is largely harmonized. The binding gap is procedural plus rating: (1) SONCAP is mandatory and non-mutual with CCC — a CCC certificate does not satisfy SONCAP; (2) the per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (issued before vessel loading) has no CCC analogue and gates port clearance; (3) testing must be to the SON-accepted NIS/IEC edition; (4) lamps and drivers must be rated and marked for 230 V / 50 Hz (Nigeria), not 220 V (China) — verify the input voltage range covers the Nigerian nominal voltage and that cap type/markings match the certified model. If a driver is shipped as a standalone product it needs its own coverage under the SONCAP certification for that model. Allow SONCAP lead time per shipment in the logistics plan.
gap.zh: NIS IEC 62560 / NIS IEC 61347-2-13 与中国 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 共享相同 IEC 技术基础，故灯及驱动器安全内容基本协调。关键差距在程序及定额：（1）SONCAP 为强制且与 CCC 互不认可——CCC 证书不满足 SONCAP；（2）每批 SONCAP 证书（装船前签发）无 CCC 对应，且为港口清关关卡；（3）检测须按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本；（4）灯及驱动器须按 230 V / 50 Hz（尼日利亚）而非 220 V（中国）定额并标志——须核实输入电压范围覆盖尼日利亚标称电压，且灯头类型/标志与认证型号一致。若驱动器作为独立产品出货，须在该型号的 SONCAP 认证下单独涵盖。须在物流计划中为每批货物预留 SONCAP 前置时间。
gap.zht: NIS IEC 62560 / NIS IEC 61347-2-13 與中國 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 共享相同 IEC 技術基礎，故燈及驅動器安全內容基本協調。關鍵差距在程序及定額：（1）SONCAP 為強制且與 CCC 互不認可——CCC 證書不滿足 SONCAP；（2）每批 SONCAP 證書（裝船前簽發）無 CCC 對應，且為港口清關關卡；（3）檢測須按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本；（4）燈及驅動器須按 230 V / 50 Hz（奈及利亞）而非 220 V（中國）定額並標誌——須核實輸入電壓範圍覆蓋奈及利亞標稱電壓，且燈頭類型/標誌與認證型號一致。若驅動器作為獨立產品出貨，須在該型號的 SONCAP 認證下單獨涵蓋。須在物流計劃中為每批貨物預留 SONCAP 前置時間。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamps and LED drivers require SONCAP (Product Certificate + per-shipment SONCAP Certificate); assessed against NIS IEC 62560 / NIS IEC 61347-2-13
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory (product- and power-range dependent) — GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 are the applicable safety standards under CNCA-C10-01

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps and LED drivers entering Nigeria are assessed under SONCAP against NIS IEC 62560 and NIS IEC 61347-2-13 — a Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate issued before vessel loading. The safety content is largely harmonized with China's IEC-derived GB 24906 / GB 19510.14, but CCC does not satisfy SONCAP. Test to the SON-accepted NIS/IEC edition, rate and mark products for 230 V / 50 Hz, and ensure standalone drivers are covered by their own SONCAP certification. The per-shipment SC is the binding non-CCC step and must precede vessel loading.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入尼日利亚的自镇流 LED 灯及 LED 驱动器在 SONCAP 下依据 NIS IEC 62560 及 NIS IEC 61347-2-13 评估——产品证书加在装船前签发的每批货物 SONCAP 证书。安全内容与中国源自 IEC 的 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 基本协调，但 CCC 不满足 SONCAP。须按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本检测，按 230 V / 50 Hz 定额并标志，并确保独立驱动器由其自身 SONCAP 认证涵盖。每批 SC 是关键的非 CCC 步骤，须在装船前完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入奈及利亞的自鎮流 LED 燈及 LED 驅動器在 SONCAP 下依據 NIS IEC 62560 及 NIS IEC 61347-2-13 評估——產品證書加在裝船前簽發的每批貨物 SONCAP 證書。安全內容與中國源自 IEC 的 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 基本協調，但 CCC 不滿足 SONCAP。須按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本檢測，按 230 V / 50 Hz 定額並標誌，並確保獨立驅動器由其自身 SONCAP 認證涵蓋。每批 SC 是關鍵的非 CCC 步驟，須在裝船前完成。
